text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Walking through the park one day, I spot
someone climbing over the barriers fencing the
pond. Is that who I think it is?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's all over... I should just chuck myself in and let
the waters claim me...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer?! Don't try to stop me! I'm no better than
the algae at the bottom of this pond, so I might
as well join it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I should let the current whisk me away, have the
fish nibble at my body, and wait for the swans to
pull me out and resuscitate me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: It's... It's... Well, look at this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She shows me a news article about the Kinko Sho.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
"Matikanefukukitaru was almost unbearable to
watch."

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
"Her results aren't the issue—it's simply that the
miniscule amount of effort she puts in on the
track makes it uncomfortable to look at her."

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
"She doesn't take any pride in herself as an
athlete or show any sense of the showmanship her
fans desire."

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: "As a racing fan, I find it difficult to even"... Sniffle... "call her an Umamusume. She's more like a"... Sob...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Urk! You didn't have to read the last part!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But... they're right. It's all true. Every word hurts
so much to hear, I wish my ears would just fall
off...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I had it all wrong. I thought all I needed was luck
on my side—that everyone would be okay with
it...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But I should have known it wasn't okay. Now I've
gone too far and even said horrible things to
Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention, I don't even know how to begin
apologizing to all my fans...
choice_data_list: You still have the Takarazuka Kinen.
You still have the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Wait... you're right. Spring has only begun.
I could turn things around at the Takarazuka
Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: But... No, it's no good. It won't work, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
We're forgetting one crucial point. The fans
decide who runs at the Takarazuka Kinen—not us!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
After all I've done, who would bother throwing my
name in the hat? I've already gone and betrayed
them.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for trying to make me feel better. I
know I've disappointed you too.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's probably too late, but I'll try to find some way
to make it up to you...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
For now, I'll just feed the fish in the pond and
head back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru begins to throw bits of bread
into the pond, and the koi happily gobble it up.
